title: King salmon: hit or miss
summary: BOB HALLINEN / Anchorage Daily News more | enlarge A couple of fishermen wait out the last half hour before the 2004 opening of the king fishery on the Anchor River. As of May 22, 2007, nearly 1,000 kings had been counted by the Anchor River sonar -- twice the amount from this time last year. title: Soldotna hunter puts trophy moose head on display
summary: SCOTT MOON / The Peninsula Clarion via The Associated Press enlarge Chuck Winters shot his trophy moose in 2006. It is on display at Trustworthy Hardware and Fishing in Soldotna. The animal's rack is 65 inches.
